description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 27, 2026 (Reiwa 8, Friday), the 1st regular session of the Hanno City Council convened.

The session runs from February 27 through March 25. Council members will review a total of 39 agenda items, including a request for approval of executive decisions made without prior council approval, proposed ordinances, supplementary budget proposals, and the initial budget proposal for the fiscal year.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13191.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City Council Regular Session, 1st Meeting of Reiwa 8 (2026)
